b = 400% of c
b = 400/100 * c
b = 4c

Now, we know that a is 25% of b, so we can write:
a = 25% of b
a = 25/100 * b
a = 0.25b

Substitute the value of b from the previous equation:
a = 0.2

a + b = 30 + 32

2. You can also book a helicopter tour. You will have to pay an extra fee for this service. This option is for a more luxurious experience.
